---
name: LinkedIn selector broke
about: The skill couldn't find a button/field because LinkedIn changed its UI
title: "[selector] "
labels: selector-break
---

> ⚠️ **Do not paste real profile data or full-page screenshots that show your name, email, or connections.** Crop to just the broken UI element.

LinkedIn changes its interface often. When it does, the selectors in `execute/linkedin-selectors.md` can stop matching. Thanks for flagging it.

**Which element broke?**
(e.g. "the pencil/edit button on the Skills section", "the About description textarea")

**Which phase / step was running?**
(e.g. "Phase 6, Step 6.6 — adding a skill")

**What did the skill say or do?**
(the message it showed, or "it clicked the wrong thing" — redact personal data)

**If you can, the current selector**
(open the element in Chrome DevTools → right-click → Copy → Copy selector, and paste the structure here — no personal data)

**Your setup**
- OS:
- Date you saw this: (LinkedIn rolls UI changes gradually, so the date helps)
